name: Bug.Splash TD : Debugged
short_description: Bug.Splash TD : Debugged is a strategic tower defense experience set in a fantasy universe. Defend your gate against hordes of bugs using a variety of towers and the environment. The game features 24 towers, 15+ enemy types, dedicated idle farming maps, custom diffculty options and tons of upgrades
detailed_description:
Bug.Splash TD : Debugged is a strategic tower defense game based on an elemental damage system. Defend your gate against ever increasing hordes of bugs on various maps using a variety of towers with unique effects

Features:
- 24 towers for you to experiment with
- everything unlocked right from the start, choose the way you play!
- achievements, a full run to completion takes around 2.5 to 3 hours
- nearly infinite upgrades, respec without cost!
- idle maps to farm for upgrades
